message:
feat(fp-frame): add where_cond_series, mask_series, fillna_limit

- Series::where_cond_series / mask_series: accept Series as replacement values
- DataFrame::where_cond_df / mask_df_other: accept DataFrame as replacement
- Series::fillna_limit / DataFrame::fillna_limit: fill at most N consecutive NaNs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
